paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Joseph was brought down to Egypt; and Potiphar, an officer of Pharaoh`s, the captain of the guard, an Egyptian, bought him of the hand of the Ishmaelites, that had brought him down thither.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Jehovah was with Joseph, and he was a prosperous man; and he was in the house of his master the Egyptian.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And his master saw that Jehovah was with him, and that Jehovah made all that he did to prosper in his hand.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Joseph found favor in his sight, and he ministered unto him: and he made him overseer over his house, and all that he had he put into his hand.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And it came to pass from the time that he made him overseer in his house, and over all that he had, that Jehovah blessed the Egyptian`s house for Joseph`s sake; and the blessing of Jehovah was upon all that he had, in the house and in the field.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he left all that he had in Joseph`s hand; and he knew not aught [that was] with him, save the bread which he did eat. And Joseph was comely, and well-favored.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And it came to pass after these things, that his master`s wife cast her eyes upon Joseph; and she said, Lie with me.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: But he refused, and said unto his master`s wife, Behold, my master knoweth not what is with me in the house, and he hath put all that he hath into my hand:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: he is not greater in this house than I; neither hath he kept back anything from me but thee, because thou art his wife: how then can I do this great wickedness, and sin against God?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And it came to pass, as she spake to Joseph day by day, that he hearkened not unto her, to lie by her, [or] to be with her.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And it came to pass about this time, that he went into the house to do his work; and there was none of the men of the house there within.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And she caught him by his garment, saying, Lie with me: and he left his garment in her hand, and fled, and got him out.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And it came to pass, when she saw that he had left his garment in her hand, and was fled forth,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: that she called unto the men of her house, and spake unto them, saying, See, he hath brought in a Hebrew unto us to mock us: he came in unto me to lie with me, and I cried with a loud voice:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and it came to pass, when he heard that I lifted up my voice and cried, that he left his garment by me, and fled, and got him out.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And she laid up his garment by her, until his master came home.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And she spake unto him according to these words, saying, The Hebrew servant, whom thou hast brought unto us, came in unto me to mock me:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and it came to pass, as I lifted up my voice and cried, that he left his garment by me, and fled out.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And it came to pass, when his master heard the words of his wife, which she spake unto him, saying, After this manner did thy servant to me; that his wrath was kindled.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Joseph`s master took him, and put him into the prison, the place where the king`s prisoners were bound: and he was there in the prison.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: But Jehovah was with Joseph, and showed kindness unto him, and gave him favor in the sight of the keeper of the prison.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the keeper of the prison committed to Joseph`s hand all the prisoners that were in the prison; and whatsoever they did there, he was the doer of it.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: The keeper of the prison looked not to anything that was under his hand, because Jehovah was with him; and that which he did, Jehovah made it prosper.
